content: CAP treatment is guided by severity scores (CURB-65 or PSI/PORT score). Outpatient: healthy patients receive amoxicillin or doxycycline; comorbidities warrant combination beta-lactam + macrolide or respiratory fluoroquinolone monotherapy. Inpatient non-ICU: beta-lactam (ceftriaxone, ampicillin-sulbactam) + macrolide OR respiratory fluoroquinolone. ICU: beta-lactam + macrolide OR beta-lactam + respiratory fluoroquinolone; add vancomycin or linezolid if MRSA suspected; add piperacillin-tazobactam or cefepime if Pseudomonas risk. HAP/VAP: empiric coverage for MRSA (vancomycin/linezolid) plus antipseudomonal agent based on local antibiogram. Duration typically 5-7 days for CAP if clinical stability achieved.
